# archive/ — frozen historical versions

**Read-only.** Do not edit anything here. If you need something, copy it forward into `app/` or `next-scaffold/`.

## Contents

- `v1-prototype/prototype-a/` — v1 prototype (was `_reference/original-brief/current-prototype/`)
- `v1-prototype/prototype-b/` — v1 alt prototype (was `_reference/my-rounds-1-and-2/`)
- `v1-prototype/screenshots/` — v1 reference screenshots
- `v2-design/` — claude.ai/design V2 handoff (React components + CSS, screenshots, HTML doc)
- `earlier-handoff/london-cut/` — even earlier HTML handoff (predates v1)
- `earlier-design/design.gz` — opaque design archive (tarball)
- `compiled-exports/london-cuts-v3.html` — single-file standalone export of app/
- `compiled-exports/london-cuts-v2-handoff.html` — V2 handoff doc with embedded demos
